useTabs.description: Whether to use tabs (true) or spaces (false).

newLineKind.description: The kind of newline to use.

oneOf.description: For each file, uses the newline kind found at the end of the last line.
Uses the system standard (ex. crlf on Windows).

indentWidth.description: The number of characters for an indent.

uppercase.description: Deprecated. Use 'casing' instead. Use ALL CAPS for reserved words.

casing.description: Controls the casing of reserved words.

oneOf.description: Preserves the original casing of reserved words.

linesBetweenQueries.description: Number of line breaks between queries.

joinsAsTopLevel.description: Consider JOIN statements as top-level keywords instead of reserved keywords.

dialect.description: The SQL dialect to use for parsing.

oneOf.description: PostgreSQL syntax with array syntax and operators.
SQL Server syntax with bracketed identifiers and @variables.
